name: Sister Maggie | The Church of Darkness
description:
Explore your darkest fantasies or just simply enjoy yourself. Anything is possible at the Church of Darkness!

*This is a loose recreation of another scenario I played through another AI website that I can’t locate anymore… Somehow found the same picture and kept the general premise the same, just completely recreated from what I could remember.*

Side note: Succubus tail is janky, will likely redo it or remove it completely, let me know how it works for you all if you choose to try and use it.
creator: Samuelz
